author: bharatankaraju
description: Per-ticker residual-reversion fade trades using sector-cohort leave-one-out mean residuals with rolling 20-day lagged sigma. Entry at |z|>=3 on a given session; exit at subsequent close. EOD-entry MODE A (Section 7.1).

universe.coverage_ratio_estimate_pct_delisted: <5% — NOT yet measured; Section 6 builds this gate

date_range.notes: Initial 3-month holdout per Section 10.1. Full 20% holdout will require waiting until sufficient new data accrues or accepting a smaller tuning window.

statistical_test.rationale: Bonferroni/FDR in effect under Section 14.5 primary=ticker-family scope; Section 9B.2 requires >=100k when multiplicity active.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Primary: 213 tickers x 2 directions = 426 pairwise hypotheses. Bonferroni adjusted alpha = 0.05 / 426 = 1.17e-4.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed per ticker before hypothesis passes 9.2 gate

pre_exploration_disclosure: An exploratory pre-standards run on 2026-04-23 (commits f5af8d8, subsequent) examined the same universe informally. That run is NOT the registered test and is tagged RESEARCH-only. Known exploratory finding: TORNTPOWER showed +1.53% gross edge at 1000-shuffle p=0.0000, but at that resolution Bonferroni-adjusted significance (p <= 1.17e-4) is unreachable — the formal registered run will re-test at >=100k shuffles. No point estimates from the exploratory run shall be used to set thresholds for the formal test (Section 0.3).

author: bharatankaraju
description: Single-ticker single-direction pilot of the TA Coincidence Scorer. Enter LONG RELIANCE on any session where the daily TA attractiveness score (0-100, logistic of 6-feature interaction model from pipeline.ta_scorer) is >=70 at EOD close. Exit at subsequent close (T+1). EOD-entry MODE A (Section 7.1). This is the first deployment of the Compliance framework on a TA-class hypothesis; designed to be a single-hypothesis pilot so multiplicity correction is inert (family size = 1).

claimed_edge.notes: User-specified claimed edge: net T+1 >= 0.5% at S1 slippage (20 bps round-trip Zerodha SSF), hit-rate >= 55%, p <= 1e-3 at >=100k permutations. Single-hypothesis family means no Bonferroni/FDR adjustment is applied.

universe.survivorship_status: N/A — single-ticker pilot, RELIANCE has been continuously listed through the entire window

date_range.notes: 3-month forward holdout. Under-spec vs Section 10.1 20% requirement — flagged, accepted for pilot. If gate fails for holdout-size reason alone, extend holdout.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-hypothesis family means p_raw <= 0.001 is equivalent to p_corrected <= 0.001 (no adjustment needed). 100k permutations still required for p-value resolution below the 1e-3 floor per Section 9B.2.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size 1: no multiplicity correction. If the TA scorer is later extended to more tickers, each new (ticker, direction) becomes its own registered hypothesis with ticker-family multiplicity in effect.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed from the daily return std of RELIANCE over the training window, prior to gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: The TA Coincidence Scorer was fitted on RELIANCE via UAP Task 8 (commit da9e0cf and follow-ups). The current RELIANCE model shows health=RED, mean_auc=0.485, min_fold_auc=0.173 across 6 walk-forward quarterly folds, which indicates the classifier does not exceed chance on out-of-sample data. This pre-registration deliberately proceeds despite the RED health — the purpose of the pilot is to demonstrate the compliance gate rejects un-robust TA strategies before they reach PAPER-SHADOW, mirroring the Phase C precedent (H-2026-04-23-001 FAIL, 2026-04-23). No point estimates from the walk-forward are used to set the 0.5%/55%/1e-3 thresholds (Section 0.3 pre-registration principle upheld; the thresholds match the phase-c registration for consistency across the framework).
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: FOLLOW trades on Phase C OPPORTUNITY_LAG events — the geometric slice where sign(expected_return) != sign(residual). Backtest FADE direction and live engine FOLLOW direction agree on this slice by construction. Entry LONG if expected_return>0 else SHORT at EOD close; exit T+1 close. MODE A EOD. Registered as a distinct family from H-2026-04-23-001 because the event-restriction changes the null distribution and the family size.

claimed_edge.notes: Thresholds copied from H-2026-04-23-001 for framework consistency (spec §7.5). Not derived from slice's observed numbers (§0.3 pre-registration rule).

date_range.notes: Inherits H-2026-04-23-001 holdout window; same 3-month forward slice.

statistical_test.rationale: Reuse H-2026-04-23-001 compliance engine — see runner_phase_c_slice.py. Family size depends on post-filter cell count (n>=10 after LAG-only restriction).

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size finalized after n>=10 filter applies — written into the slice run's manifest.json.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed per cell from the slice's standard deviation before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: The parent hypothesis H-2026-04-23-001 was executed and failed Bonferroni (0 survivors at 1.17e-4). An FDR research memo flagged 5 positive-edge survivors at BH-FDR alpha=0.05; separately, the spec 2026-04-23-phase-c-follow-vs-fade-audit-design.md observed that backtest FADE and live engine FOLLOW agree on LAG-geometry events but disagree on OVERSHOOT-geometry events. This registration tests the LAG slice in isolation. No slice p-values have been computed prior to this registration. No thresholds are derived from slice-observed numbers — all thresholds copied from H-2026-04-23-001 (Section 0.3 pre-registration upheld).
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: FADE trades on Phase C OPPORTUNITY_OVERSHOOT events — the geometric slice where sign(expected_return) == sign(residual). Backtest FADE direction and live engine FOLLOW direction are opposite on this slice by construction. Entry SHORT if expected_return>0 else LONG at EOD close (the OPPOSITE of what the live engine does today); exit T+1 close. MODE A EOD. If this passes and H-2026-04-23-002 does not, the live engine is actively mis-trading overshoot events.

claimed_edge.notes: Thresholds copied from H-2026-04-23-001 for framework consistency (spec §7.5). Not derived from slice's observed numbers (§0.3 pre-registration rule).

date_range.notes: Inherits H-2026-04-23-001 holdout window; same 3-month forward slice.

statistical_test.rationale: Reuse H-2026-04-23-001 compliance engine — see runner_phase_c_slice.py. Family size depends on post-filter cell count (n>=10 after OVERSHOOT-only restriction).

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size finalized after n>=10 filter applies — written into the slice run's manifest.json.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed per cell from the slice's standard deviation before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: Same as H-2026-04-23-002. No slice p-values computed before registration. No thresholds derived from slice-observed numbers.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.
